source_note: Hand-verified against the actual DRHP text in prospectus.txt (Draft Red Herring Prospectus; Falcon Yarns Share Purchase Agreement cited dated September 22, 2025 - a pre-IPO draft, price band not yet set). All amounts in ₹ lakhs unless noted (note the unit differs from the Vidya Wires/Knack Packaging fixtures, which use ₹ million - a correct extractor should not silently misconvert units). Every figure below was independently located in prospectus.txt via grep/read from the 'Summary of selected financial information derived from our Restated Financial Information' and 'Objects of the Issue' / risk-factor sections, not taken from any prior LLM extraction output.

financial_metrics._note_on_profit_growth: FY23->FY24 PAT growth of ~1439% is real, not a typo - FY2023 PAT (Rs 105.83 lakh) was unusually depressed, so the jump to Rs 1,628.76 lakh in FY2024 is a genuine low-base effect per the restated financials, not a fabrication risk to flag against the model.
financial_metrics._note_on_nulls: Valuation ratios (P/E, P/B, EV/EBITDA) are not computable pre-price-band. Current ratio/debt-to-equity were not located as explicitly-stated computed values in the retrieved text - treated as unverifiable rather than guessed. Return on equity IS explicitly disclosed here (unlike the Vidya Wires/Knack Packaging fixtures) and is recorded above for manual review.

use_of_funds_inr_lakh.purpose: Part payment of the purchase consideration for the acquisition of Falcon Yarns Private Limited
use_of_funds_inr_lakh.note: Balance tranche of the Rs 13,151 lakh total consideration under the Falcon SPA dated September 22, 2025, payable within 30 days of IPO completion; Rs 1,000 lakh of the total was already paid by September 20, 2025 and a further Rs 1,000 lakh falls due before January 1, 2026, per the risk factors section (no separate 'Objects' amount table with a Net Proceeds split was located in the retrieved text).

business_facts.products: Carded, combed, and compact combed cotton yarns, and cotton bales
business_facts.key_customer_concentration: 7 Seas Impex (reseller) accounted for 33.88%, 54.73% and 66.61% of revenue from products in Fiscal 2025, 2024 and 2023 respectively
business_facts.pending_acquisition: Falcon Yarns Private Limited (100% equity, Share Purchase Agreement dated September 22, 2025)
